name: GET /api/workflows/:slug/metrics - Aggregate funnel metrics for a workflow
description: Operator-facing analytics endpoint. Aggregates the live leads table (count by stage) against the workflow definition to produce per-step funnel counts, cumulative reach counts, conversion rate, and loss rate. Read-only, recomputed on every call — when the analytics-service lands, this same shape can be hydrated from materialized views without a contract change. Powers the Metrics panel on the admin-cockpit Workflows screen.

testCases.name: Fetch metrics for the lead-to-customer workflow
